nodes.name: BullMQ Trigger
nodes.notes: TODO: Replace with BullMQ/Redis queue trigger when n8n queue mode supports it. In production, the API enqueues jobs to 'sms-inbound' queue. Use n8n webhook trigger as bridge: API calls n8n webhook → n8n processes.

parameters.query:
SELECT t.*, sp.prompt_text as system_prompt
FROM tenants t
LEFT JOIN system_prompts sp ON sp.tenant_id = t.id AND sp.is_active = TRUE
WHERE t.id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
LIMIT 1
